name: Banana Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the bananas into thin pieces.
2. Dry them thoroughly in an oven or dehydrator until completely dried.
3. Once dried, grind the banana slices in a food processor or mortar and pestle.
4. Pass the ground powder through a fine sieve to remove any lumps.
5. This flour can be used in equal parts with regular flour when making desserts that require a starchy ingredient.
